title: Build an asset pipeline that avoids runtime stalls
description: Move asset import/conversion to build time and load at runtime asynchronously so the main loop never blocks on disk.
body: Steps: 1. Convert source assets (textures, models, audio) into engine-ready, compressed formats at build/import time, not at runtime. 2. Pack assets to reduce file count and seek overhead. 3. Load at runtime on a worker thread or via async streaming, never synchronously on the main loop. 4. Stream by proximity/level and unload what is out of range. 5. Show placeholders until a load completes rather than stalling. Rollback point: before changing the on-disk format (invalidates cached assets). Validation: entering a new area causes no main-thread stall and frame time stays within budget while assets stream in; a synchronous load on the game loop is the stall this pipeline prevents.
